events.title: Night Falls
events.description: Night has fallen. Something stirs in the darkness.
events.defaultPrompt: Night falls on the village. Tell the roles what they observe and how they react.

events.title: Strange Rumor
events.description: A rumor spreads through the crowd.
events.defaultPrompt: A strange rumor is spreading. Each role should react based on what they heard and their character.

events.title: Public Accusation
events.defaultPrompt: A public accusation has been made. The accused must defend themselves and others may react.

events.title: Unexpected Visitor
events.description: A stranger arrives at the scene.
events.defaultPrompt: An unexpected visitor arrives. Describe their appearance and manner, and how each role reacts.

events.title: Discovery
events.defaultPrompt: A significant discovery has been made. Each role should react to this new information.
